4: The festive mood in the Quicksand is palpable as you and Dural Tharal enter, and you immediately encounter fans proudly donning yellow and purple─those of the Songbird Narumi and Picot, the Seneschal Prince. With their enthusiastic testimonials heard and noted, Dural Tharal requests one last interview with a bystander he observed on Ruby Road, and thus the two of you make for the main street once more.

The festive mood in the Quicksand is palpable as you and Dural Tharal enter, and you immediately encounter fans proudly donning yellow and purple─those of the Songbird Narumi and Picot, the Seneschal Prince. With their enthusiastic testimonials heard and noted, Dural Tharal requests one last interview with a bystander he observed at the Ruby Road Exchange, and thus the two of you make for the main street once more.

5: In a fateful twist, the young bystander Dural Tharal eyed on Ruby Road is none other than Aldiytha Thorne, heir to House Thorne of Little Ladies' Day fame. As she gazes upon the boisterous spectacle from afar, she expounds upon the value of enjoying one's favorite pastimes. Inspired by Aldiytha's observations, Dural Tharal expresses his thanks to the young Thorne for her time and looks to you for another word.

30: Speak with the royal handmaiden on Emerald Avenue and complete the FATE “Live from Ul'dah”.

59: I could scarcely ask for a more perfect opportunity for promotion! Where the <Emphasis>Mythril Eye</Emphasis> goes, fame and prestige are bound to follow. The Songbirds and the Senechal Prince will be thrilled to hear of this!

78: With that, I believe I have enough to embark on our excursion. When you are set to search the city for some tried and true testimonials, simply say the word!

88: Ah, attending to some errands elsewhere? Worry not. I shall return to the royal seneschal on Ruby Road─join me there when you are ready to resume reporting!

89: Wonderful! Let us recommence our journalistic jaunt!

100: In fact, her dedication inspires me to be more mindful in my day-to-day living! Even with something as simple as descending the stairs, I'll often find myself thinking “I <Emphasis>must</Emphasis> be careful. Masha needs me!”

116: Ahem! As assumed, our performers possess a fiery fanbase! With this wealth of wisdom, I am well-prepared to write. But one thing struck me as strange─while we were wandering, I espied an elegant young lady surveying the Songbirds' and Seneschal's stage from afar.

119: By the by, did you know that Picot devised this meal especially for the seasonal menu here? Beneath the bold, savory flavors, there's a hint of something delicately sweet...just like him!

120: Lady Aldiytha suffers from a frail constitution... Should the worst come to pass, 'tis my solemn duty as to remain at her side.

137: I owe you one for your committed coperation. Indeed, I've amassed all manner of ardent accounts from the fans!

160: Admit that you reveled in every moment.
